customer_message: It's too expensive. I need to think about it.
suggested_reply: I understand. Would it help if I explain the value more clearly or show an option that fits your budget better?
summary: Customer showed interest but hesitated because of price.
crm_note: Price objection raised. Customer asked for time to think.

customer_message: I've already explained this twice and nothing has changed.
suggested_reply: I understand your frustration. Let me take ownership of this and summarize the issue clearly so we can move faster.
summary: Customer is frustrated due to repeated unresolved issue.
crm_note: Customer reported repeated issue and frustration. Escalation risk present.

customer_message: I can't pay today. Maybe next week.
suggested_reply: Understood. What day next week would be most realistic for you so I can note it correctly?
summary: Customer could not pay today and suggested a possible delay until next week.
crm_note: Customer unable to pay today. Possible follow-up next week.
